metadata.title: 4th Pass Debug Factorial — GCP SkyPilot with SWAG + Calibration
metadata.priority: P0 — validates full factorial on cloud GPU before production spend
metadata.estimated-cost: ~$5-10 GCP L4 spot (24 GPU jobs, 2 epochs each)

layer.name: Biostatistics
layer.description: Analytical choices (alpha, ROPE, ANOVA strategy) — not a sweep factor

factorial-design.summary: Total conditions: 4×3×2 × 2×2 × 5 = 480 (IDENTICAL to production) Debug scope reductions (ONLY 3): 1 fold, 2 epochs, half data GPU jobs: 24 cells × 1 fold = 24 (each runs training + SWAG internally) Zero-shot baselines: 2 (SAM3 Vanilla on MiniVess, VesselFM on DeepVess) POST_TRAINING_METHODS env var: "none,swag" (comma-separated, parent flow iterates)

phase.name: Pre-Flight: Docker Image Verification
phase.description: Verify Docker image in GAR includes all required code. The flow merger (training_subflow + post_training_subflow) is fully implemented. mamba-ssm v2.3.1 is confirmed installed in the image.

tasks.task: Verify GAR image freshness: docker manifest inspect

Check if image needs rebuild (Phase 0 config committed 2026-03-21 23:33, image built 2026-03-20 18:50 — config YAMLs are NOT in image but run_factorial.sh reads them from the HOST repo, not from inside Docker)
Verify: docker run minivess-base:latest python -c "import mamba_ssm; print(mamba_ssm.__version__)"
Verify: docker run minivess-base:latest python -c "from minivess.ensemble.swag import SWAGModel"
Verify SkyPilot GCP configured: sky check gcp
Verify .env has HF_TOKEN, MLFLOW_TRACKING_URI

phase.name: Dry Run
phase.description: Execute run_factorial.sh with --dry-run flag. Verify correct job count (24 trainable + 2 zero-shot = 26 total). Verify POST_TRAINING_METHODS=none,swag is passed to each job. Verify correct config parsing from configs/factorial/debug.yaml.

tasks.task: ./scripts/run_factorial.sh --dry-run configs/factorial/debug.yaml
Verify output shows: 24 GPU jobs, 4 models, 3 losses, 2 aux_calibs, 1 fold
Verify POST_TRAINING_METHODS=none,swag in each job's env
Verify 2 zero-shot baselines (sam3_vanilla fold-0, vesselfm fold-0)

phase.gate: Dry run output matches expected 26 total launches

phase.name: Single-Condition Smoke Test
phase.description: Launch ONE condition (dynunet × cbdice_cldice × calib=false × fold-0) to verify the full SkyPilot → Docker → train_flow → SWAG pipeline works end-to-end before committing to 24+ GPU jobs.

tasks.task: sky jobs launch deployment/skypilot/train_factorial.yaml \ --name smoke-dynunet-cbdice-f0 \ --env MODEL_FAMILY=dynunet \ --env LOSS_NAME=cbdice_cldice \ --env FOLD_ID=0 \ --env WITH_AUX_CALIB=false \ --env MAX_EPOCHS=2 \ --env MAX_TRAIN_VOLUMES=23 \ --env MAX_VAL_VOLUMES=12 \ --env EXPERIMENT_NAME=debug_factorial \ --env POST_TRAINING_METHODS=none,swag \ --env-file .env \ -y
Monitor: sky jobs logs smoke-dynunet-cbdice-f0
Verify training sub-flow completes (2 epochs)
Verify SWAG post-training sub-flow runs
Verify MLflow run created with correct tags (flow_name, post_training_method)
Verify checkpoint in GCS bucket (gs://minivess-mlops-checkpoints)

phase.gate: Smoke test job SUCCEEDED with both training + SWAG completing

phase.name: Launch All 24 Trainable Conditions
phase.description: Launch full debug factorial grid: 4 models × 3 losses × 2 aux_calib × 1 fold = 24 jobs. Each job runs training (2 epochs) + SWAG post-training internally. Use /factorial-monitor skill to track progress.

tasks.task: ./scripts/run_factorial.sh configs/factorial/debug.yaml
Monitor: sky jobs queue (all 24 should be PENDING/RUNNING)
Monitor using /factorial-monitor skill

Watch for known failure modes: - mambavesselnet: CUDA kernel compilation (mamba-ssm) - sam3_topolora: LoRA targeting (fixed in code, first cloud test) - sam3_hybrid: VRAM pressure with SWAG (L4 = 24 GB, should be sufficient)

phase.gate: All 24 jobs reach SUCCEEDED or have clear actionable errors
phase.estimated-time: ~30-60 minutes (jobs run in parallel on GCP)

phase.name: Launch Zero-Shot Baselines
phase.description: Launch 2 zero-shot evaluation jobs. These are included in run_factorial.sh and launch automatically after trainable conditions.

tasks.task: SAM3 Vanilla on MiniVess (fold-0, MAX_EPOCHS=0, ZERO_SHOT=true)
VesselFM on DeepVess (fold-0, MAX_EPOCHS=0, ZERO_SHOT=true, EVAL_DATASET=deepvess)
Note: DeepVess data must be on GCS (DVC-tracked and pushed)

phase.gate: Both zero-shot baselines complete or have clear errors

phase.name: Analysis + Biostatistics (Post-GPU)
phase.description: After all GPU jobs complete, run Layer C (analysis) and Layer D (biostatistics). These flows read from MLflow and process all 480 conditions (24 training × 2 post-training × 2 recalibration × 5 ensemble).

tasks.task: Run Analysis Flow: inference on served models, ensemble building
Run Biostatistics Flow: 6-way layered ANOVA, interaction plots
Collect metrics for all 480 conditions

phase.name: Report
phase.description: Write 4th pass report documenting results, failures, and lessons.

tasks.task: Write docs/planning/run-debug-factorial-experiment-report-4th-pass.md
Compare with 1st pass (dynunet-only) and 3rd pass (local SWAG)
Document any model failures and root causes
Decision: ready for production (72 GPU jobs) or need 5th pass?

known-blockers.blocker: mamba-ssm v2.3.1 is installed in current GAR image. Verified via: docker run minivess-base:latest python -c "import mamba_ssm; print(mamba_ssm.__version__)" → 2.3.1

Fully implemented: training_subflow() at line 724, post_training_subflow() at line 977, parent training_flow() wires both at lines 1319-1359. Handles comma-separated POST_TRAINING_METHODS. Phase 0 config committed as c9a1030.

blocker.description: DeepVess data on GCS for VesselFM zero-shot

known-blockers.blocker: DeepVess data needs to be DVC-tracked and pushed to GCS for the VesselFM baseline. If not available, VesselFM zero-shot will fail (Phase 4). Not blocking Phase 3.
Fixed in this session: consolidated to configs/factorial/, removed checkpoint_averaging, removed hardcoded execution locations, updated registry and KG. All 44 tests pass.
